confidence_rationale: Clear visualization of all major task components. Suture placement accuracy assessed from direct observation of needle entry at marks. Completion time clearly observable from instrument entry to final positioning.

technique_summary: Exceptional expert-level performance with rapid completion time of 21 seconds, well below expert benchmark of 60-100s. All phases executed efficiently with no observable penalties.
strengths: Extremely rapid completion time indicating high proficiency
Accurate suture placement at both target marks
improvement_suggestions: Performance appears to be at expert level with minimal room for improvement
Maintain consistency in this excellent technique
